summary: Frontend-only testing of Pocket FM Expo app. Verified mobile preview UI shell, testID presence, all 4 tabs, playlists modal + create flow, favorites empty state, sleep-timer chips + countdown + cancel, and playlist persistence across tabs. All target testIDs rendered and functional. No JS errors, no red-screen.

react_native_issues.issue: Non-blocking deprecation warnings in console: 'shadow*' style props and 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated. Cosmetic only; suggest migrating to boxShadow and style.pointerEvents.

action_items: (Optional) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow and props.pointerEvents -> style.pointerEvents to silence console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: LibraryScreen file at ~200 lines — still OK, but consider extracting the two Modal sheets (track actions + playlist picker) into dedicated components for reuse/readability.
Favorites `onMore={() => toggleFavorite(item.id)}` is semantically incorrect — the more-button should open actions sheet, not toggle favorite. Minor UX concern.
seed_data_creation: Created one playlist 'TEST Chill Vibes' during testing (stored locally in AsyncStorage of preview browser; not persisted server-side).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tested tab shells + flows verified on mobile viewport 390x844 in dark scheme. Preview URL requires `await page.emulate_media(color_scheme='dark')` for correct color rendering. Audio playback with real files cannot be tested via web preview (expo-document-picker limitation on web).
